preamble: The nasalized vowel [ẽ] denasalizes to the regular vowel [e] through loss of nasalization. This process is documented in Romance languages, where nasalization may be lost in certain phonological environments or speech registers.

examples.note: Denasalization of [ẽ] to [e] in certain phonological contexts or speech variation.

context: Before /l/ or /w/ in Polish; denasalization in specific consonantal contexts (Romance languages: denasalization in various contexts)
allophones_note: Polish: denasalization before sonorants; French: denasalization in various speech contexts
